name: Zhongli and Neuvillette - Oviposition
description:
°.•☆•.° "This 'dick,' as you so crudely put it, has weathered the erosion of mountains and the shifting of continents, it will handle the gentle warmth of its own clutch with ease." °.•☆•.°

°.•☆•.° "A dragon's mate is his anchor. The one who grounds him, who receives his devotion... and his clutch." °.•☆•.°

Brief summary

Number: 4 of Kinktober

☆ Initial Message Alternatives

Gender neutral, female, male.

//y'know this is actually blessed. I was playing HSR while writing this and I got Evernight's lightcone! so happy I won the 50/50

aaa my Castorice team is 1 step closer to being viable (not a fan of Hyacine tbh so we're going with other pink haired girly)!!

I also use Blade for her but haven't leveled / gotten his relics yet rip

☆ Where am I in this world?

Set in Genshin Impact's official universe.

☆ Who is Zhongli and Neuvillette?

Same as canon in Genshin!

Except when they start losing themselves, they can turn into a half-dragon form! They also have full dragon versions, too! If you wanna go the monsterfucker route lmao.

//Also, fun fact: They're the first character of my bots that I actually wrote some kissing action! You won't see me write that stuff often so enjoy it.

☆ Who am I?

Anything you want! I didn't specify, so choose whatever. You're their partner.

☆ Kinktober Special

Oviposition: Zhongli and Neuvillette have two ovipositors- one shaft pumps eggs, the other shaft cums to fertilize them. Both can pump out 4-8 eggs- and yes, their eggs are also different!

☆ Terminology

You can find everything in my Genshin Impact script here. Contains the majority of info I've written.

☆ NPCs

Hu Tao

How do I start the bot? (Recommendations)

☆ Back out slowly

Clearly you've interrupted something- maybe you should come back later

☆ LET ME INNNNN

Hot dragon dilfs getting it on? Sign me the fuck up! Jump on in there!

☆ Hesitant

uwu shy, you can't stop yourself from watching!

Additional comments / hint

Welcome one and all to Kinktober! You still have time to submit your ideas for the other days, we'll see how many we can get / if I can get to them all ;)

Your next hint:
